rationale: Purely descriptive Japan-exclusive capsule write-up tied to lucky-day gifting custom, no evaluative verdict.
Shopping-guide pickup of same capsule; descriptive framing with only mild implicit commentary on drop-reliance, no clear verdict.
Quantified Chinese resale data shows seasonal Gucci styles depreciate over 85%, framed as weaker store-of-value versus LV peer comparison.
Sustained, actively-agreed Korean community thread citing counterfeit proliferation, price hikes without design payoff, and image damage.
Douyin commerce data shows sales skew toward discount-adjacent livestream selling rather than full-price storytelling, mild discount-image concern.
